---
title: "Reference Search"
output:
  html_document:
    includes:
      in_header: "https://www.mygospelbuddy.com/docs/header.html"
      after_body: "https://www.mygospelbuddy.com/docs/footer.html"
---

<style>
h1.title {
  display: none;
}
</style>

<link rel="stylesheet" href="search-common.css">

<div class="gb-search-shell" id="referenceSearchApp">
  <nav class="gb-search-nav" aria-label="Search tools">
    <a class="gb-search-nav__link gb-search-nav__link--active" href="https://www.mygospelbuddy.com/search/">Reference Search</a>
    <a class="gb-search-nav__link" href="https://www.mygospelbuddy.com/search/words">Conference Text Search</a>
    <a class="gb-search-nav__link" href="https://www.mygospelbuddy.com/blog/using-conference-text-search.html">Search Guide</a>
  </nav>

  <section class="gb-search-hero">
    <h1 class="gb-search-hero__title">Reference Search</h1>
    <p class="gb-search-hero__subtitle">Find General Conference talks that reference or quote a scripture passage, with a layout and result table that feel much closer to Gospel Buddy.</p>
    <div class="gb-search-help">
      <p class="gb-search-help__title">Quick help</p>
      <p class="gb-search-help__copy">Use the dropdown modes for one chapter at a time. Use the text mode when you want to search a chapter range like <strong>Alma 32-33</strong> or a cross-chapter range like <strong>Genesis 1:31-2:3</strong>.</p>
      <ul class="gb-search-help__list">
        <li>Quick verse is best for a single verse or a whole chapter.</li>
        <li>Verse range is best for one continuous range inside one chapter.</li>
        <li>Advanced text is best for abbreviations, chapter ranges, and complex references.</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="gb-search-card">
    <div class="gb-search-card__heading">
      <div>
        <h2 class="gb-search-card__title">Choose a reference</h2>
        <p class="gb-search-card__subtitle">Pick the mode that fits your search. The dropdown modes are easier for first-time use, while text mode keeps the existing power-user flexibility.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="gb-mode-switch" role="tablist" aria-label="Reference search modes">
      <button type="button" class="gb-mode-switch__button gb-mode-switch__button--active" data-reference-mode="quick">Quick verse</button>
      <button type="button" class="gb-mode-switch__button" data-reference-mode="range">Verse range</button>
      <button type="button" class="gb-mode-switch__button" data-reference-mode="text">Advanced text</button>
    </div>

    <div class="gb-panel is-active" data-reference-panel="quick">
      <div class="gb-form-grid gb-form-grid--3">
        <div class="gb-field">
          <label class="gb-field__label" for="quickBook">Book</label>
          <select id="quickBook" class="gb-select">
            <option value="">Select a book</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="gb-field">
          <label class="gb-field__label" for="quickChapter">Chapter</label>
          <select id="quickChapter" class="gb-select">
            <option value="">All chapters</option>
          </select>
          <p class="gb-field__hint">Choose a chapter before searching.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="gb-field">
          <label class="gb-field__label" for="quickVerse">Verse</label>
          <select id="quickVerse" class="gb-select">
            <option value="all">All verses</option>
          </select>
          <p class="gb-field__hint">Leave this on All verses to search the whole chapter.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="gb-panel" data-reference-panel="range">
      <div class="gb-form-grid gb-form-grid--4">
        <div class="gb-field">
          <label class="gb-field__label" for="rangeBook">Book</label>
          <select id="rangeBook" class="gb-select">
            <option value="">Select a book</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="gb-field">
          <label class="gb-field__label" for="rangeChapter">Chapter</label>
          <select id="rangeChapter" class="gb-select">
            <option value="">All chapters</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="gb-field">
          <label class="gb-field__label" for="rangeStartVerse">Start verse</label>
          <select id="rangeStartVerse" class="gb-select">
            <option value="all">All verses</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="gb-field">
          <label class="gb-field__label" for="rangeEndVerse">End verse</label>
          <select id="rangeEndVerse" class="gb-select">
            <option value="all">All verses</option>
          </select>
          <p class="gb-field__hint">End verses before the selected start verse are disabled automatically.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="gb-panel" data-reference-panel="text">
      <div class="gb-field">
        <label class="gb-field__label" for="textReference">Reference input</label>
        <textarea id="textReference" class="gb-textarea" placeholder='Examples: Alma 32 | Alma 32-33 | Genesis 1:31-2:3 | 1 Ne. 3:7'></textarea>
        <p class="gb-field__hint">This mode supports abbreviations, chapter ranges, and cross-chapter references inside one book. Very large ranges are blocked so the results stay useful and fast.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="gb-btn-row">
      <button type="button" class="gb-btn gb-btn--primary" id="referenceSearchButton">Search</button>
      <button type="button" class="gb-btn gb-btn--secondary" id="referenceClearButton">Clear current mode</button>
    </div>

    <div id="referenceStatus" class="gb-status" aria-live="polite"></div>
  </section>

  <section class="gb-search-card">
    <div class="gb-search-card__heading">
      <div>
        <h2 class="gb-search-card__title">Study options</h2>
        <p class="gb-search-card__subtitle">These options bring the website search closer to the Chrome extension and help narrow the talk list after you search.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="gb-form-grid gb-form-grid--4">
      <div class="gb-field">
        <label class="gb-field__label" for="referenceCountMode">Count mode</label>
        <select id="referenceCountMode" class="gb-select">
          <option value="footnotes">Total footnote mentions</option>
          <option value="talks">Distinct talks</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      <div class="gb-field">
        <label class="gb-field__label" for="referenceYearFrom">Year from</label>
        <input id="referenceYearFrom" class="gb-input" type="number" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="1970">
      </div>

      <div class="gb-field">
        <label class="gb-field__label" for="referenceYearTo">Year to</label>
        <input id="referenceYearTo" class="gb-input" type="number" inputmode="numeric" placeholder="2025">
      </div>

      <div class="gb-field">
        <label class="gb-field__label" for="referenceMonth">Conference month</label>
        <select id="referenceMonth" class="gb-select">
          <option value="">All months</option>
          <option value="April">April</option>
          <option value="October">October</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      <div class="gb-field">
        <label class="gb-field__label" for="referenceSpeaker">Speaker contains</label>
        <input id="referenceSpeaker" class="gb-input" type="text" placeholder="Russell M. Nelson">
      </div>

      <div class="gb-field">
        <label class="gb-field__label" for="referencePageSize">Rows per page</label>
        <select id="referencePageSize" class="gb-select">
          <option value="25">25</option>
          <option value="50">50</option>
          <option value="100">100</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      <div class="gb-field">
        <span class="gb-field__label">Apostles only</span>
        <label class="gb-checkbox" for="referenceApostlesOnly">
          <input id="referenceApostlesOnly" type="checkbox">
          <span>Use only talks from Apostles of the Church.</span>
        </label>
      </div>

      <div class="gb-field">
        <label class="gb-field__label" for="referenceMinQuotePercent">Minimum quoted percentage</label>
        <div class="gb-range-wrap">
          <input id="referenceMinQuotePercent" class="gb-range" type="range" min="0" max="100" step="1" value="0">
          <div class="gb-muted">Current filter: <strong id="referenceMinQuotePercentValue">All</strong></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="gb-btn-row">
      <button type="button" class="gb-btn gb-btn--ghost" id="referenceResetButton">Reset settings to defaults</button>
    </div>
  </section>

  <div id="referenceResults"></div>
</div>

<script src="search-common.js"></script>
<script src="scriptureDisplay.js"></script>
<script src="search.js"></script>
